summary: P0 Conversational Intelligence Testing - All tests passed. Backend: 5/5 tests passed for session_id acceptance, fallback generation, chat history injection, session isolation, and response structure. Frontend: All flows work - admin login, chat tab, message send/receive, session persistence in localStorage, chat continuity across messages.

issues: testID attributes exist in React Native code but render as standard HTML elements in web - need to use placeholder/text selectors instead of data-testid. Not a bug but worth noting for future test automation.

critical_code_review_comments: session_id flow is correctly implemented: client sends session_id -> server uses it for DB queries -> server returns it in response
get_recent_agentic_messages() properly queries by session_id when provided, enabling multi-turn context
Frontend correctly persists chatSessionId to localStorage and sends it with each message
clearChat() correctly generates a new session ID, resetting conversation context
DEVIN_CONVERSATION_STYLE_PROMPT adds warmth and natural conversation guidelines
clean_response_for_user() properly strips internal XML tags before displaying to user
seed_data_creation: Test created temporary agentic_conversations documents with TEST_ prefixed session IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 conversational intelligence is complete and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/agentic-chat (accepts session_id, returns session_id, injects history). Frontend stores chatSessionId in localStorage and sends with each message. Devin agent ID: 1f38520b-5351-4476-83e2-7c07ae06f52c. All selectors work but use placeholder text for React Native Web rather than data-testid.

features_verified.Chat history injection for continuity: PASS - second message correctly references first
features_verified.Session ID fallback generation: PASS - generates user_id:agent_id format when not provided
features_verified.Response structure complete: PASS - includes session_id, message with id/role/content
features_verified.Frontend chat continuity: PASS - Devin recalls info across messages in same session
